name: Guud Dawg!
short_description: Embark on a goofy, chaotic adventure as a dog, dodging wacky enemies through a maze of mayhem, all while carrying out your owner's wishes.
detailed_description:
Step into a wild, unpredictable world of a dog, where nothing makes sense, and every corner brings ridiculous and dangerous enemies.

Scramble through 93 crazy levels, fetching, rescuing, and outsmarting enemies at every turn and doing whatever it takes just to please the owner.

Survive mazes packed with wacky enemies, from homeless bums and clowns to club-wielding seals, rampaging gorillas, and Mechasaurus Rex, all while dodging oncoming traffic and relying on a less-than-practical defense to avoid disaster at every turn.

Watch as enemies cause mayhem and even taking each other down, as you race to complete your mission across a variety of chaotic environments.
